a:r.a:t: Q15: The metrics in my plan align with the organization's sales strategy.

Note: Average scores reflect the weighted mean of responses on a 5-point Likert scale (5 = Strongly Agree to 1 = Strongly Disagree), based on the distribution of all responses within each grouping. Neutral responses are included in the scoring as “3” but are excluded from the chart.
Alignment between metrics and sales strategy is stronger among managers and directors compared to non-managers, indicating a disconnect at the frontline level
Sales non-managers show significantly lower alignment compared to Sales management tracks, potentially highlighting a lack of visibility into the sales strategy
